---
title: "\'Our Young Ladies, as Described by the Minister\'s Daughter\'"
---

## \'Our Young Ladies, as Described by the Minister\'s Daughter\'

**Author:** Euphemia E. G. Bussell
**Date:** 1877
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (January-November 1877)

### Notes

Evidently not published separately in volume form.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
